response.justification: While Sarah demonstrates strong systems engineering skills and optimization experience across multiple domains, the role requires deep expertise in hardware architecture, SoC modeling, and GPU/AI accelerator optimization—areas not present in her background. Her experience is primarily in web/application-level systems rather than hardware-software co-design for accelerators.
strengths: Proven ability to optimize performance across diverse systems (low-latency microservices, pricing algorithms, async I/O with D Lang)
Deep systems engineering foundation with experience across embedded systems, DevOps, and multiple languages including C++
Currently exploring AI infrastructure at re:cinq, showing recent interest in the broader AI domain
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture design, or performance simulation—core requirements for the role
Minimal background in deep learning workloads, neural networks, or GPU architecture optimization despite claimed AI-agent infrastructure work
Career trajectory focused on application/web development and tooling rather than systems architecture or hardware-level optimization

key_factors.factor: No deep learning or GPU optimization background
